name: Forsys Metals Corp.
description: Forsys Metals Corp. is an emerging uranium development company focused on advancing its flagship Norasa Uranium Project in Namibia, Africa. The Norasa Project, which includes the fully permitted Valencia and Namibplaas deposits, is one of the few large-scale, open-pit uranium projects globally with a completed feasibility study. The company is dedicated to becoming a significant supplier to the global nuclear energy industry by leveraging its strategic location in a premier mining jurisdiction and its substantial resource base to meet the growing demand for clean, carbon-free power.
